fields.helpText: The name assigned to a transmission router or destination point that data will be electronically transmitted to, usually at the Austin DPC.
Maximum number of lines of FIXED LENGTH records to allow in a single mailman message.
Maximum number of lines of VARIABLE LENGTH records to allow in a single mailman message.

The mail router is the actual router name/destination that is given to a transmission router for electronic flow of data to usually the Austin DPC.  For example, the mail router used to transmit Fee Basis data to Austin DPC is named Q-FEE.VA.GOV
